violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cider) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Owner will apply for a variance. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The floors in the toilet room, beneath the large single bay sink used as a hand sink, and storage area are covered in carpet which is not easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

Employees' personal belongings were observed stored in the market, shelf outside the toilet room, and storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
